contexts.candidate_description: detect and choose place before carrying object to place zone
contexts.prompt_text:
Stage-aware planner context for G4/place_occupied candidate=g4_avoid_occupied_primary
Candidate steps: base_move_to_region, torso_set_height, detect_place_occupancy, choose_alternate_place, dual_arm_pregrasp, dual_arm_approach, dual_gripper_close, dual_arm_synchronized_lift, dual_arm_level_object, segmented_transport, base_move_to_place, dual_arm_place, dual_gripper_release, verify_place_zone
[candidate_generation] use 2 positive memories; recommended skills: base_move_to_region, torso_set_height, detect_place_occupancy, choose_alternate_place, dual_arm_pregrasp, dual_arm_approach
[candidate_ranking] compare against 2 risk memories; max risk=0.8000
[sandbox_rewrite] critic warnings=4; watch skills: base_move_to_region, torso_set_height, dual_arm_pregrasp, dual_arm_approach
[execution_writeback] recent similar executions=3
Use generation evidence for candidate construction, ranking evidence for risk penalties, rewrite evidence for sandbox repair, and writeback evidence before committing execution.

candidate_generation.description: successful or validated episodes used as positive candidate evidence

candidate_ranking.description: failure and sim-real gap memories used as ranking risk evidence

sandbox_rewrite.description: critic warnings, blocks, and risky histories used as rewrite evidence

execution_writeback.description: recent executed/writeback and real-format evidence used before committing execution
